description.en: A string that can be used on<th>elements (not on<td>), specifying an alternative label for the header cell. This alternate label can be used in other contexts, such as when describing the headers that apply to a data cell. This is used to offer a shorter term for use by screen readers in particular; and is a valuable accessibility tool. Usually, the value ofabbris an abbreviation or acronym, but can be any text that's appropriate contextually.
